content.text: How can I write a flexible Python function to extract external URLs marked as homepage or download links from an HTML page?
If the HTML structure changes from a <th> tag to something else like an '<a>' tag with a specific class, will this function still find those download URLs?

The current implementation only checks for exact matches of '<th>Home Page' and '<th>Download URL'. To support dynamic tags or classes, you would need to modify the second loop using broader selectors like CSS selectors instead of fixed strings.
Great! This helps me understand how to improve link extraction robustness.
